response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work, with most of their career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and web/mobile stacks; while they have some C++ exposure from a 6-month role, it is insufficient and not sustained, and their leadership experience is unproven in cloud compute contexts.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Active open-source contributor and technical educator
Demonstrated ability to own and ship complex systems (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Only 6 months of C++ experience, far below 8-year minimum
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems design
Lacks documented mentorship or architectural ownership in cloud/DevOps teams
